# Ride The Tide

> South Africa's GP-led peptide protocol service. We pair German-certified, third-party lab-tested research peptides with personalized, physician-supervised protocols for fat loss, healing, and performance.

Ride The Tide bridges the gap between unsupervised online peptide vendors and traditional clinics. Every protocol is reviewed by a registered South African GP, every compound is ≥99% purity with a Certificate of Analysis, and every order ships discreetly from within South Africa in unmarked packaging.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.ridethetide.site/): Brand overview, hero, featured products, customer proof
- [Shop all peptides](https://www.ridethetide.site/shop): Full catalogue of research peptides priced in ZAR
- [Fat Loss Protocol](https://www.ridethetide.site/fat-loss-protocol): 12-week GLP-1-led fat loss program with BMI calculator
- [Free Protocol Quiz](https://www.ridethetide.site/quiz): 6-step diagnostic that recommends a personalized peptide stack
- [Research Hub](https://www.ridethetide.site/research): 500+ citations and the Peptide Protocol Pro tool
- [Clinician program](https://www.ridethetide.site/clinician): For South African GPs and practitioners
- [About](https://www.ridethetide.site/about): Mission, team, German-certified sourcing, partner pharmacies
- [FAQ](https://www.ridethetide.site/faq): Shipping, dosing, storage, legality in South Africa

## Products

- [RT3 (Retatrutide)](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/rt3-reta): Triple agonist of GLP-1, GIP and glucagon receptors. Used in metabolic and obesity research.
- [TZ-2 (Tirzepatide)](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/tz2-tirz): Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist for metabolic research.
- [Tesamorelin](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/tesamorelin): GHRH analog used in growth hormone secretion studies.
- [BPC-157 / TB-500 Blend](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/bpc-tb500-blend): Body Protection Compound combined with TB-500 for tissue repair research.
- [GHK-Cu 50mg](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/ghk-cu-50mg): Copper peptide studied for wound healing and collagen synthesis.
- [MOTS-C](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/mots-c): Mitochondrial-derived peptide for metabolism and exercise research.
- [Glow70](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/glow70): Skin and hair regeneration research blend.
- [Klow80](https://www.ridethetide.site/product/klow80): Recovery and longevity research blend.

## Trust & quality

- ≥99% purity confirmed by independent third-party labs; Certificate of Analysis available per batch.
- German-certified manufacturing standards.
- All protocols reviewed by a South African registered General Practitioner.
- Discreet, unbranded packaging. Same-day dispatch on orders before 14:00 SAST.
- 30-day satisfaction guarantee on sealed vials.
- Compliant with South African POPIA data-protection law.

## Service area

South Africa only. Pricing in ZAR. Major metro delivery in 1–3 business days.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.ridethetide.site
- WhatsApp support available via the floating chat button on every page.

## Disclaimer

All compounds are supplied for research purposes. Therapeutic use is permitted only under prescription from a registered South African physician via our partner pharmacies and GP-led protocol pathway.
